specific_question: Which product received the most negative online reviews on the Lee's Market website due to a poor product image in Q2 2025?
answer: According to Lee's Market's website reports for Q2 2025, 'Andy's Canned Broccoli' has gotten one-star reviews due to the brown coloring of the broccoli.
